ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hvac_systems" (
  "identifier" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each HVAC system record */,
  "avg_temp_ctrl" REAL /* Average temperature control setting for the HVAC system */,
  "avg_cool" REAL /* Average cooling temperature recorded */,
  "avg_heat" REAL /* Average heating temperature recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the HVAC system is installed */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* State or province where the HVAC system is installed */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the HVAC system is installed */,
  "age_of_home_years" INTEGER /* Age of the home in years */,
  "hvac_mode" TEXT /* Mode of HVAC operation (e.g., cool, heat, auto) */,
  "calendar_event" TEXT /* Calendar event setting for scheduling */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate category of the location */,
  "allow_comp_with_aux" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if auxiliary systems are allowed to compete with the main system */,
  "has_electric" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the system is electric */,
  "has_heat_pump" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a heat pump is installed */,
  "aux_heat_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used for auxiliary heating (if applicable) */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of HVAC system installed (e.g., split, packaged, ducted) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of HVAC system installation */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of last inspection or maintenance */,
  "system_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the HVAC system */,
  "system_model" TEXT /* Model number of the HVAC system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or area of expertise for the technician */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service request */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the HVAC system related to the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the service request was made */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue reported by the homeowner */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the service request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_requests_identifier FOREIGN KEY ("identifier") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("identifier")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Request ID associated with the feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Customer ID who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "would_recommend" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer would recommend the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES service_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the customer */,
  "home_type" TEXT /* Type of home (e.g., single-family, townhouse, condominium) */,
  "home_size_sqft" INTEGER /* Size of the home in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hvac_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier of the HVAC system */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was recorded */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption measured (in kWh) */,
  "temperature_variability" REAL /* Variability in temperature settings */,
  "system_uptime" REAL /* System uptime percentage */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service area entry */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Technician ID associated with the service area */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* State or province of the service area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the service area */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the service area */,
  "radius_of_operation" INTEGER /* Radius of operation in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_areas_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technicians ("tech_id")
)
